name: Bert Kreischer
bio: Bert Kreischer is an American stand-up comedian, podcaster, and television host known for high-energy storytelling, often performing shirtless. His signature story, The Machine, recounts how he inadvertently helped rob a train during a college trip to Russia and became a viral hit. He hosts the podcasts Bertcast and Two Bears One Cave and starred in the 2023 film The Machine, based on the routine.

timeline.ev: Named the top partyer at the number-one party school by Rolling Stone
Comedy Central special Comfortably Dumb airs
The Machine special airs on Showtime, fueled by his viral story
Releases the Netflix special Secret Time
Stars in the feature film The Machine

accolades: Star of the 2023 film The Machine, adapted from his viral story
Co-host of the chart-topping podcast Two Bears One Cave

bits.t: Has Only Made His Dad Laugh Once
